allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -h localhost -d tfg -c "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='Client' AND column_name IN \('blacklistReason','blacklistedAt'\);")

hooks.command: REPO=/Users/carlosmartinnavarro/Desktop/YO/TFGBrian/TFG && MSG=$(git -C "$REPO" log -1 --format="%s") && DATE=$(git -C "$REPO" log -1 --format="%ad" --date=format:"%d/%m/%Y") && if echo "$MSG" | grep -qE '^C -> \['; then DESC=$(echo "$MSG" | sed 's/.*-> \[\(.*\)\]$/\1/'); VER=$(echo "$MSG" | grep -oE 'C -> \[[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\]'); else DESC="$MSG"; VER="$MSG"; fi && grep -qF "$VER" "$REPO/CHANGELOG.md" 2>/dev/null || printf '| %-11s | %-70s | %-25s |\n' "$DATE" "$DESC" "$VER" >> "$REPO/CHANGELOG.md" 2>/dev/null || true
